zh.lifeSummary: 當John Downe於1525年出生在英國戴文皮爾頓時，他的父親Sir John Downe24歲，母親Katherine Wills21歲。他於1560年與Maria Phillips在英國英格蘭戴文皮爾頓結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1620年在英國英格蘭戴文皮爾頓享年95歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭戴文尼特 羅蘭。

nameMeanings.name: Downe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Down
meanings: English (Devon): topographic name for someone who lived on or near a down or low hill, from Middle English dun(e), doun(e) (Old English dūn) ‘down, low hill’. See also Downer .

English (Devon): possibly in some cases a patronymic from the Old English personal name Dūn, but later names of this origin cannot reliably be distinguished from those originating from the topographic sense. See Dunn 2.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When John Downe was born in 1525, in Pilton, Devon, England, his father, Sir John Downe, was 24 and his mother, Katherine Wills, was 21. He married Maria Phillips in 1560, in Pilton, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1620, in Pilton, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 95, and was buried in Nymet Rowland, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

Il est décédé en 1620, à Pilton, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 95 ans, et a été enterré à Nymet Rowland, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Downeが1525年にイギリスデボンピルトンで生まれた時，父Sir John Downeは24歳，母Katherine Willsは21歳であった。1560年にイギリスイギリスデボンピルトンでMaria Phillipsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1620年にイギリスイギリスデボンピルトンで95歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデボンニーメット ロウランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Downe(이)가 1525년 영국 데폰 피턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Downe(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine Wills(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1560년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 피턴에서 Maria Phillips(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1620년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 피턴에서 95세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 니멧 로우랜드에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Downe родился в 1525 г. в местности пилтон, девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Downe было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Katherine Wills, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Maria Phillips в 1560 г. в местности пилтон, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1620 г. в местности пилтон, девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 95 лет и был похоронен в местности нимет роуланд, девон, Англия, Великобритания.
